notes: Ratios are read from docs/perf/insertion_deltas.md and docs/perf/corpus_proof_deltas.md
Per-case overrides can be used for documented, stable outliers while keeping strict defaults
Threshold checks can be waived in CI by setting PERF_REGRESSION_WAIVE=1
Thresholds tightened after 2026-03-04 baseline refresh (insertion max observed 0.99, corpus max observed 0.74)
Rust insertion source currently comes from docs/perf/raw/rust_insertion_bench_20260309T231432Z.txt
